ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric of the model evaluation */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric of the model evaluation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric of the model evaluation */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score metric of the model evaluation */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* ROC AUC metric of the model evaluation */,
  "pr_auc" REAL /* PR AUC metric of the model evaluation */,
  "runtime_seconds" REAL /* Runtime in seconds for the model evaluation */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., AI research, software development) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the evaluation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runtime_metrics" (
  "runtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runtime metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model evaluation */,
  "runtime_seconds" REAL /* Runtime in seconds for the model evaluation */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in megabytes during the model evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtime_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the model deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_issue_reports" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue with the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_issue_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
